title: ericoides moschatum
intro: Ericoides moschatum, also known as the musky wintergreen or sweet wintergreen, is a low-growing, evergreen shrub native to North America. Its medicinal properties include containing methyl salicylate, which has anti-inflammatory and analgesic properties, similar to aspirin. The health benefits of Ericoides moschatum include its ability to reduce pain and inflammation, relieve headaches, and support digestive health. Herbal preparations of Ericoides moschatum can be found in teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties and health benefits.
